CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, data Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> y, data, [1, 0, 0, 1, 0]) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x + y, data, [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> if(x > 25, 1, 0), data, [0, 0, 0, 0, 0]) AS result FROM test_table;
WITH (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id = 3) AS subquery SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> if(x == 0, 1, 0), subquery, [0, 0, 0, 0, 0]) AS result;
SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> if(x % 2 = 0, 1, 0), [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], [1, 0, 0, 1, 0]) AS result UNION ALL SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x * y, [1, 2], [0, 0]);
WITH (SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> y, data, [1, 0, 0, 1, 0]) FROM test_table) AS res SELECT * FROM res;
CREATE TABLE another_table AS SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x - y, [1, 2, 3], [3, 2, 1]) AS differences;
INSERT INTO another_table SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x * y, data, [1, 1, 1, 1]) FROM test_table;
